subcodes.first_line: O leaf set atremble by that Luminary of the horizons! His light of favors encompassed that lineage, and His glances of grace were continuous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مهتزه آن نیر آفاق نور الطافش شامل آن دودمان بود و لحاظ عنایت مستدیم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
